name: rldyour-mcps
description: Управляемые MCP-серверы Codex без hidden transports. EN: Controlled MCP runtime set.

interface.longDescription: Управляемый MCP runtime Codex для approved servers, pinned launchers и safe tool routing. EN: This plugin connects the owner's approved MCP server set for Codex: Serena, Sequential Thinking, Chrome DevTools, Context7, DeepWiki, Grep by Vercel, shadcn, Dart/Flutter, Figma, and OpenAI Developer Docs. Chrome DevTools MCP remains the specialist browser DevTools provider for console, network, runtime, performance, memory, Lighthouse, and live Chrome inspection. Webwright and Playwright CLI live in the browser provider policy outside MCP. OpenAI Developer Docs MCP is the authoritative source for current OpenAI and Codex product documentation. Local launcher packages and host runtime prerequisites are pinned through config/mcp-runtime-versions.env and strict runtime validation. The plugin does not define global agent behavior and does not store secrets. It is responsible only for MCP transport configuration; specialized skills, memory policies, security rules, and workflow commands belong in separate plugins. User-facing conversation remains Russian unless the owner asks otherwise, while repository documentation is written in English.
defaultPrompt: Покажи MCP-серверы. EN: show MCP servers.
Выбери MCP для задачи. EN: route MCP tools.
Проверь MCP доступность без записи. EN: read-only MCP check.
